news.summary: The EU's much-delayed Entry/Exit System will change the way UK passengers travel to 29 countries.

news.headline: Measles rise across US: Dozens of states report alarming outbreaks
news.summary: In the US vaccine rates are dropping leading to outbreaks in the measles virus. The country is on the verge of losing its status as having eliminated the virus. The most cases have occurred in the state of South Carolina, where medical professionals are sounding the alarm for the rest of the country

news.headline: Zelenskyy says Ukrainian interceptors downed Iran drones in the Middle East
news.summary: Ukraine's Zelenskyy previously announced that 228 Ukrainian experts had been deployed to the region.

news.headline: George Sand: The French woman writer who outsold Victor Hugo
news.summary: In this edition, we explore the creative brilliance of French author, George Sand as we mark the 150th anniversary of her death. news.headline: EU airline industry warns of fuel shortages if Strait of Hormuz stays closed
news.summary: The trade body for European airports said if the Strait of Hormuz did not open in the next three weeks, there could be shortages.

news.headline: Man accused of coercing wife into sex with 120 men goes on trial in Sweden
news.summary: The 61-year-old denies threatening physical violence and plying his wife with drugs to force her into having sex with strangers.
